changelog: v1.5.19: Temperature units (°F default + °C toggle), dark mode overlay, feedback dedup fix.
changes: NEW: Temperature units — °F by default, °F/°C toggle in header. Converts all temps: CPU, GPU, thresholds, charts, history, benchmarks.
NEW: Preference saved to profiles/preferences.json — survives restarts
NEW: Wes Mode — Eve announces unit switch: 'Switched to Fahrenheit for you! 💕'
NEW: Dark mode overlay — 🌙 toggle in header for deeper blacks and higher contrast
FIX: Feedback rate limiter no longer silently drops unique messages — only duplicate spam is blocked
